tool_args.label: LIRR & Metro-North Key Performance Metrics - January 2025

payload.title: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.prepared_for: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

warnings: entity.parent_organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent organizations are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

payload.description: Long Island Rail Road is comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

warnings: entity.parent_organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent organizations are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

tool_args.label: Metro-North 2024 total ridership
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North's ridership grew with total 2024 ridership east and west of the Hudson reaching 67.4 million, 12.1% higher than 2023's total and nearly 78% of the pre-COVID total for 2019.

tool_args.label: New Radio Dispatch Control System for Metro-North
tool_args.raw_text: This month, MTA Construction & Development is beginning to replace Metro-North's existing radio dispatch console system.

payload.project_name: New Radio Dispatch Control System for Metro-North
payload.description: Replacement of Metro-North's existing radio dispatch console system. Includes upgrades to Operations Control Center in Grand Central Terminal and backup Emergency Control Center in North White Plains. Equipment deliveries to approximately 80 locations throughout Hudson, Harlem, and New Haven lines. Migration from SONET to DWDM backbone network.

warnings: project.implementing_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Implementing agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Haverstraw Commuter Ferry Terminal
tool_args.raw_text: The new Haverstraw Commuter Ferry Terminal was unveiled in December

payload.description: New 748-square-foot heated shelter with benches and ticket booth. Connects Haverstraw to Metro-North's Hudson Line service at Ossining Station.

warnings: project.operator is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Operator is an entity relation, not a project enum. Suggested relation: operated_by.

tool_args.label: Laurelton Station Platform Reconstruction
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR is building on its progress enhancing accessibility at stations and is beginning the new year working on the Laurelton Station platform reconstruction.

payload.description: ADA accessibility project. For 3 weekends in February, service will be adjusted along the Atlantic Branch. By project end, Laurelton Station will be fully accessible.

tool_args.label: West Side Storage Yard Fall Arrest System
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR is improving safety precautions for employees at the West Side Storage Yard (WSSY) and has installed a fall arrest system to protect workers at the facility.

payload.project_name: West Side Storage Yard fall arrest system
payload.description: Triple monorail fall arrest system within the WSSY Maintenance of Equipment Shop on tracks 5 and 6, with new staircase and elevated steel platform with retractable gangway system at railcar roof level.

tool_args.label: Babylon Station Improvement Project
tool_args.raw_text: President Free responded, informing Max about the ongoing Babylon Station Improvement Project, which includes two 12-car platforms, new canopies, enhanced lighting, escalators, staircases, upgraded platform waiting rooms, and security cameras.

payload.description: Includes two 12-car platforms, new canopies, enhanced lighting, escalators, staircases, upgraded platform waiting rooms, and security cameras.

tool_args.label: AI-Aided Trespasser Detection System
tool_args.raw_text: In 2021, we partnered with Rutgers University to implement the AI-Aided Trespasser Detection System at Hudson Avenue in Peekskill.

payload.description: Implemented at Hudson Avenue in Peekskill in partnership with Rutgers University. Has monitored over 600,000 events and identified more than 8,200 violations.

tool_args.label: Train Door Detection System
tool_args.raw_text: Working with Rutgers, the C3RS team developed a new train spotting procedure at high-risk locations and collaborated with Rutgers to validate the solution using AI. This initiative led to a 100% reduction in off-platform door incidents at Harlem-125th Street.

payload.description: New train spotting procedure at high-risk locations developed with Rutgers and C3RS. Led to 100% reduction in off-platform door incidents at Harlem-125th Street.

tool_args.label: Ronkonkoma Grade Crossing Elimination
tool_args.raw_text: On January 10th, it was announced that the New York State DOT was awarded a Federal Railroad Administration (FRA) grant for the necessary planning, preliminary engineering, and environmental review to eliminate the Ocean Avenue and Pond Road grade crossings in Ronkonkoma.

payload.description: Planning, preliminary engineering, and environmental review to eliminate the Ocean Avenue and Pond Road grade crossings in Ronkonkoma. Awarded FRA grant via New York State DOT.

tool_args.label: Winter Weekend fare discount program launch
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR and Metro-North kicked off the "Winter Weekend" fare discount program, enabling monthly ticket holders to travel anywhere the railroads go and bring friends or family for just $1. The program began on January 4

payload.description: LIRR and Metro-North kicked off the 'Winter Weekend' fare discount program, enabling monthly ticket holders to travel anywhere the railroads go and bring friends or family for just $1.

tool_args.label: Haverstraw Ferry Terminal ribbon-cutting
tool_args.raw_text: On Tuesday, December 17, I attended the ribbon-cutting ceremony at the new Haverstraw Ferry Terminal.

payload.description: Ribbon-cutting ceremony at the new Haverstraw Ferry Terminal.

warnings: event.participants is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Participant lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: has_participant.

tool_args.label: LIRR Safety Excellence Awards
tool_args.raw_text: we hosted our inaugural LIRR Safety Excellence Awards on January 9th

payload.description: Inaugural LIRR Safety Excellence Awards to recognize employees whose proactive and sustained efforts to improve safety for workforce and riders was deemed outstanding.

tool_args.label: FRA grant for Ronkonkoma grade crossing elimination announced
tool_args.raw_text: On January 10th, it was announced that the New York State DOT was awarded a Federal Railroad Administration (FRA) grant

payload.description: New York State DOT awarded a Federal Railroad Administration (FRA) grant for planning, preliminary engineering, and environmental review to eliminate Ocean Avenue and Pond Road grade crossings in Ronkonkoma.

tool_args.label: TRACKS safety outreach program
tool_args.raw_text: Customer and community outreach through Metro-North Railroad's Together Railroads and Communities Keeping Safe (TRACKS) program totaled 71,245 in-person contacts in 2024.

payload.claim_text: Customer and community outreach through Metro-North Railroad's Together Railroads and Communities Keeping Safe (TRACKS) program totaled 71,245 in-person contacts in 2024. Rail safety outreach was conducted at 101 stations and 15 grade crossings on the Harlem, Hudson, New Haven and West of Hudson lines.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad TRACKS program

tool_args.label: Track raises at Garrison and Wassaic
tool_args.raw_text: Track raises at Garrison and Wassaic were completed to address the effects of rising water levels in the region.

payload.claim_text: Track raises at Garrison and Wassaic were completed to address the effects of rising water levels in the region. These projects ensure smooth operations and reliability in these critical areas during major rain events.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: New Haven Line speed initiatives
tool_args.raw_text: The New Haven Line speed initiatives demonstrated innovation and forward-thinking, reducing travel times and improving the service's attractiveness for our customers.

payload.claim_text: The New Haven Line speed initiatives demonstrated innovation and forward-thinking, reducing travel times and improving the service's attractiveness for our customers.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: iPad Comply 365 implementation
tool_args.raw_text: The adoption of iPad Comply 365 transformed our operations, equipping teams with tools to enhance efficiency and streamline processes.

payload.claim_text: The adoption of iPad Comply 365 transformed our operations, equipping teams with tools to enhance efficiency and streamline processes.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad
